MANOSABA-LIQUID_MANIPULATION.description: Based on [gold]Majoka[/gold], grant all allies {LiquidManipulationPower:diff()} stacks of [gold]Liquid Manipulation[/gold] (min 10, max 30 stacks).

MANOSABA-TRUSTING_LEAP.title: Leap of Faith

Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].

{IfUpgraded:show:

Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Reflect blocked damage back to the attacker.
MANOSABA-PEACEMAKER.title: Peacemaker
MANOSABA-SABOTAGE.title: Sabotage
MANOSABA-SCAPE_GOAT.title: Scapegoat
MANOSABA-SCAPE_GOAT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Take this turn's enemy damage for one player.
MANOSABA-SNS_EXCHANGE.title: Exchange Contacts
MANOSABA-SOCIAL.title: Social
MANOSABA-SOCIAL.description:
Choose a teammate. You and that teammate gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If that teammate is [gold]Natsume Anan[/gold], both players gain {BonusBlock} extra [gold]Block[/gold].
MANOSABA-STRIKE_SAEKI_MIRIA.title: Strike
MANOSABA-CUTTER_KNIFE.title: Cutter Knife
MANOSABA-CUTTER_KNIFE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
For each stack of [gold]Healing[/gold] you have, increase damage by {ExtraDamage:diff()}.
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_SAEKI_MIRIA.title: Trauma
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_SHARING.title: Trauma Sharing
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_SHARING.description: Transfer the negative status effects from one enemy to all enemies.
MANOSABA-UNCLE_WRITING.title: Uncle Writing
MANOSABA-SMALL_PAPER.title: Small Paper
MANOSABA-SMALL_PAPER.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
[gold]Maybe there's a way out?[/gold]
MANOSABA-SPY_MOVIE.title: Spy Movie
MANOSABA-THE_WAY_OUT.title: The Way Out
MANOSABA-THE_WAY_OUT.description: Win at the end of the turn.
MANOSABA-LAND_MINE.title: Land Mine
MANOSABA-LAND_MINE.description: If this card is in your hand at end of turn, take 20 unblocked damage.
MANOSABA-JUNK.title: Junk
MANOSABA-JUNK.description: Still better than digging up a landmine.
MANOSABA-STRIKE_HASUMI_LEIA.title: Strike
MANOSABA-DEFEND_HASUMI_LEIA.title: Defend

MANOSABA-TRAUMA_KUROBE_NANOKA.title: Trauma
MANOSABA-GUN_SHOT.title: Gun Shot
MANOSABA-AIM.title: Aim
MANOSABA-AIM.description: Your next [gold]Gun Shot[/gold] attack deals an extra {AccuratePower:diff()}% damage.
MANOSABA-WARNING_SHOT.title: Warning Shot
MANOSABA-WARNING_SHOT.description:
Spend {BulletCost:diff()} bullets.
All enemies lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
Your next [gold]Gun Shot[/gold] attack deals an extra {AccuratePower:diff()}% damage.
MANOSABA-SNIPE.title: Snipe
MANOSABA-SNIPE.description:
Spend {BulletCost:diff()} bullets.
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. On the first turn, damage is increased by 50%.
MANOSABA-RECOIL_SHOT.title: Recoil Shot
MANOSABA-RECOIL_SHOT.description:
Spend {BulletCost:diff()} bullets.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MANOSABA-COOKING.title: Cooking
MANOSABA-COOKING.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Transform all [gold]Status[/gold] cards in your [gold]hand[/gold] into [gold]Accurate Cookie[/gold].
MANOSABA-ACCURATE_COOKIE.title: Accurate Cookie
MANOSABA-ACCURATE_COOKIE.description:
Your next [gold]Gun Shot[/gold] attack deals an extra {AccuratePower:diff()}% damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
MANOSABA-TAKE_COVER.title: Take Cover
MANOSABA-TAKE_COVER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Your next [gold]Gun Shot[/gold] attack deals an extra {AccuratePower:diff()}% damage.
MANOSABA-SORRY_I_MISSED.title: Sorry, I Missed
MANOSABA-SORRY_I_MISSED.description:
Spend {BulletCost:diff()} bullets.
Your next [gold]Gun Shot[/gold] attack deals an extra {AccuratePower:diff()}% damage.
MANOSABA-STEADY_SHOT.title: Steady Shot
MANOSABA-STEADY_SHOT.description: Each time you use [gold]Gun Shot[/gold], all your [gold]Gun Shot[/gold] cards gain {SteadyShotPower:diff()} damage.
MANOSABA-WEAKENING_SHOT.title: Weakening Shot
MANOSABA-WEAKENING_SHOT.description:
Spend {BulletCost:diff()} bullets.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
MANOSABA-WOUND_SHOT.title: Wound Shot
MANOSABA-WOUND_SHOT.description:
Spend {BulletCost:diff()} bullets.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
MANOSABA-TRAP_SETTING.title: Trap Setting
MANOSABA-TRAP_SETTING.description: One enemy takes double damage from [gold]Gun Shot[/gold] next turn.
MANOSABA-RELIC_SEARCH.title: Relic Search
MANOSABA-RELIC_SEARCH.description: At the end of combat, there is a {RelicChance}% chance to gain a [gold]Relic[/gold].
MANOSABA-SURPPRESSIVE_SHOOTING.title: Suppressive Shooting
MANOSABA-SURPPRESSIVE_SHOOTING.descripti:
Spend {BulletCost:diff()} bullets.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to the target {BulletCost:diff()} times and [gold]Stun[/gold] it.
MANOSABA-DARK_SIGHT.title: Dark Sight
MANOSABA-DARK_SIGHT.description:
Discard your entire [gold]Hand[/gold].
End your turn.
You take no attack damage this turn.
MANOSABA-THREE_SIXTY_NO_SCOPE.title: 360 NO SCOPE
MANOSABA-THREE_SIXTY_NO_SCOPE.descriptio:
Spend {BulletCost:diff()} bullets.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
MANOSABA-HALLUCINATION_MAGIC.title: Hallucination Magic
MANOSABA-HALLUCINATION_MAGIC.description:
Choose up to {SelectableCardsVar:diff()} cards from your [gold]Draw pile[/gold] and [gold]Discard pile[/gold], then place them on top of your draw pile.
The number you can choose increases with [gold]Majoka[/gold] (up to 10).
MANOSABA-HALLUCINATION_MAGIC.selectionSc: Place the selected cards on top of your draw pile in order from top to bottom.
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_REVEAL.title: Trauma Reveal
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_REVEAL.description: Play each teammate's [gold]Trauma[/gold] from their [gold]hand, draw pile, or discard pile[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} times.
MANOSABA-MYSTERIOUS_JUNGLER.title: Mysterious Jungler
MANOSABA-MYSTERIOUS_JUNGLER.description:
Lose {DexterityLoss:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
At the start of each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MANOSABA-JAILER_REGENERATION.title: Remains Regeneration
MANOSABA-JAILER_REGENERATION.description: At the start of each turn, Jailer restores {JailerRegenerationPower:diff()} HP.
MANOSABA-ESCAPE_ROUTE.title: Escape Route
MANOSABA-ENVIRONMENT_EXPLORE.title: Environment Explore
MANOSABA-ENVIRONMENT_EXPLORE.description:
Discard all [gold]Gun Shot[/gold] cards in your hand.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Next turn, for each [gold]Gun Shot[/gold] card discarded, draw {BonusPerGun:diff()} additional card and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MANOSABA-RELOAD.title: Reload
MANOSABA-RELOAD.description:
Discard all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Draw cards equal to the number discarded.
MANOSABA-BUTTSTROKE.title: Buttstroke
MANOSABA-BUTTSTROKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
MANOSABA-PROJECTION.title: Trace On
MANOSABA-GATE_OF_BABYLON.title: Gate of Babylon
MANOSABA-GATE_OF_BABYLON.description: Play all [gold]Simple Spear[/gold]s in your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold] targeting one enemy.
MANOSABA-LEIA_PROTECT.title: Protect
MANOSABA-LEIA_PROTECT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Take the damage from the next attack for one ally.
MANOSABA-STAND_OUT.title: Stand Out
MANOSABA-STAND_OUT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Take the damage from the next attack for all allies.
This turn, you take 50% less damage.
MANOSABA-COMEDIAN.title: Comedian
MANOSABA-COMEDIAN.description: Whenever you draw a [gold]Token, Status, Curse, or Quest[/gold] card, gain {ComedianPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MANOSABA-DANCING.title: Dancing
MANOSABA-UNLIMITED_SPEAR_WORK.title: Unlimited Spear Work
MANOSABA-UNLIMITED_SPEAR_WORK.descriptio: At the start of each turn, add an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] [gold]Forge Spear[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MANOSABA-PORTABLE_FLETCHING_STATION.desc: Gain {PortableFletchingStationPower:diff()} [gold]Portable Fletching Station[/gold]. Whenever you craft a [gold]Simple Spear[/gold], you have a {ProcChance:diff()}% chance to gain an additional [gold]Simple Spear[/gold].
MANOSABA-SPEAR_MASTERY.title: Spear Mastery
MANOSABA-SPEAR_MASTERY.description: Whenever you gain a [gold]Simple Spear[/gold], gain a [gold]Simple Spear+[/gold] instead.
MANOSABA-LUNGE.title: Lunge
MANOSABA-VOIDING.title: Dodge
MANOSABA-SWEEPING_EDGE.title: Sweeping Edge
MANOSABA-SWEEPING_EDGE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
MANOSABA-GAZE_GUIDING.title: Gaze Guiding
MANOSABA-GAZE_GUIDING.description:
Single-player: Damage you take is reduced based on your current [gold]Majoka[/gold], up to 50%.
Multiplayer: Damage taken by other teammates is reduced based on your current [gold]Majoka[/gold], up to 50%. Damage you take is unchanged.
MANOSABA-DEFENSIVE_STANCE.title: Defensive Stance
MANOSABA-DEFENSIVE_STANCE.description: Double the [gold]Block[/gold] you gain this turn.
MANOSABA-CLUSTERPHOBIA.title: Claustrophobia
MANOSABA-SHRUG.title: Shrug It Off
MANOSABA-SLIDING_STEP.title: Sliding Step
MANOSABA-RAPIER_TRICK.title: Juggling
MANOSABA-RAPIER_MASTERY.title: Rapier Mastery
MANOSABA-RAPIER_MASTERY.description: Your [gold]Rapier[/gold]'s block counterattack triggers {RapierMasteryPower:diff()} additional time(s).
MANOSABA-LOOK_UFO.title: Look, UFO
MANOSABA-LOOK_UFO.description: This enemy takes double attack damage this turn.
MANOSABA-PARALLEL_STING.title: Parallel Sting
MANOSABA-QUADRUPLE_PAIN.title: Quadruple Pain
MANOSABA-STAR_SPLASH.title: Star Splash
MANOSABA-LINEAR.title: Linear
MANOSABA-LINEAR.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Permanently increase this card's damage by {Increase}.
MANOSABA-GUARD_BREAK.title: Guard Break
MANOSABA-GUARD_BREAK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from the target.
MANOSABA-CEREMONIAL_SWORD.title: Unsheathe
MANOSABA-THE_CENTER_OF_THE_WORLD_IS.titl: The Center of the World is ...
MANOSABA-THE_CENTER_OF_THE_WORLD_IS.desc:
Make other teammate choose on turn end.
If anyone chooses Leia, she gains 4 [gold]Strength[/gold]. Otherwise, Leia gains [gold]Majoka[/gold] until she has 100.
No effect if played by another character.
MANOSABA-THE_CENTER_OF_THE_WORLD_IS_LEIA:
Right?
If you choose Leia, she gains 4 [gold]Strength[/gold].
MANOSABA-THE_CENTER_OF_THE_WORLD_IS_IGNO:
Ignore Leia.
If everyone ignores her, Leia gains [gold]Majoka[/gold] until she has 100.
MANOSABA-STARBURST_STREAM.title: Starburst Stream
MANOSABA-TREE_BRANCH.title: Tree Branch
MANOSABA-SMART_SPEAR.title: Smart Spear
MANOSABA-SMART_SPEAR.description: Whenever you draw a [gold]Simple Spear[/gold] [gold]part[/gold], add 1 [gold]Simple Spear[/gold] [gold]part[/gold] from your [gold]draw pile[/gold] to your hand. Prefer parts not currently in your hand.
MANOSABA-SMOOTH_MOVE.title: Smooth Move
MANOSABA-SMOOTH_MOVE.description: Whenever you play a card with [gold]Sword Technique[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} card.
MANOSABA-THE_CENTER.title: The Center
MANOSABA-THE_CENTER.description: Whenever another teammate plays a card or uses a potion targeting you, you gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
MANOSABA-I_AM_REBORN.title: I Am Reborn
MANOSABA-I_AM_REBORN.description: Discard your hand. Next turn, your attacks deal double damage and you draw 5 extra cards.
MANOSABA-TOUR_LIVE.title: Tour Live
MANOSABA-DUO_COMBINATION.title: Duo Combination
MANOSABA-DUO_COMBINATION.description:
Select a player. Both of you gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The next Attack card they play is played twice.
If the selected player is Nikaido Hiro, they gain {TemporaryStrength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
MANOSABA-PRISON_FOR_TWO.title: Prison for Two
MANOSABA-PRISON_FOR_TWO.description:
Select a teammate. Both of you gain {PrisonPower:diff()} [gold]Witch Island Prison[/gold].
Your [gold]Murderous Impulse[/gold] effects cannot target each other.
MANOSABA-CROWNING.title: Crowning
MANOSABA-PRIDE.title: Pride
MANOSABA-PRIDE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add 1 [gold]Crowning[/gold] to your discard pile.
MANOSABA-STRONG_SAKE.title: Strong Sake
MANOSABA-STRONG_SAKE.description: Once per turn, when you play a card with [gold]Sword Technique[/gold], gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold] next turn.
MANOSABA-REALISTIC_ACTING.title: Realistic Acting
MANOSABA-SHOW_OFF.title: Show Off
MANOSABA-SHOW_OFF.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Each time you successfully block an attack this turn, gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of next turn.
MANOSABA-ALISA_PUPPET.title: Alisa Puppet
MANOSABA-ALISA_PUPPET.description:
Apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] to a target.
If you have played [gold]Ema Puppet[/gold] this combat, apply 3 additional [gold]Burn[/gold].
MANOSABA-AN_AN_PUPPET.title: AnAn Puppet
MANOSABA-AN_AN_PUPPET.description:
All enemies lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
If you have played [gold]Noah Puppet[/gold] this combat, gain 3 [gold]Block[/gold].
MANOSABA-BORROWED_KNIFE.title: Borrowed Blade
MANOSABA-BORROWED_KNIFE.description: Another player draws {Cards:diff()} cards and gains {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MANOSABA-COCO_PUPPET.title: Coco Puppet
MANOSABA-COCO_PUPPET.description: Whenever you play a card whose name contains "puppet", gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
MANOSABA-DEFEND_TONO_HANNA.title: Defend
MANOSABA-EMA_PUPPET.title: Ema Puppet
MANOSABA-EMA_PUPPET.description:
Whenever you play a card with the "Puppet" tag, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
When you play [gold]Hiro Puppet[/gold], additionally deal {HiroBonus:diff()} damage to all enemies.
MANOSABA-FLYING_BROOM.title: Flying Broom
MANOSABA-FLYING_BROOM.description:
You and another player gain [gold]Soar[/gold] until the start of your next turn.
If the target is [gold]Sherry[/gold], both players gain a [gold]Picnic Time[/gold] that can be played for free this turn.
MANOSABA-HANNA_PUPPET.title: Hanna Puppet
MANOSABA-HANNA_PUPPET.description:
Gain [gold]Soar[/gold] for one turn.
If you have played [gold]Sherry Puppet[/gold] this combat, gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].
MANOSABA-HIRO_PUPPET.title: Hiro Puppet
MANOSABA-SLIP_FALL.title: Slip
MANOSABA-SLIP_FALL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Add 1 [gold]Wound[/gold] to your [gold]Discard pile[/gold].
MANOSABA-ICE_STRIKE.title: Ice Strike
MANOSABA-ICE_STRIKE.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each stack of your [gold]Puppet Collection[/gold].
MANOSABA-LEIA_PUPPET.title: Leia Puppet
MANOSABA-LEIA_PUPPET.description:
At end of combat, gain {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold].
If you have played [gold]Miria Puppet[/gold] and [gold]Coco Puppet[/gold] this combat, gain 5 additional [gold]Gold[/gold].
MANOSABA-MARGO_PUPPET.title: Margo Puppet
MANOSABA-MARGO_PUPPET.description:
At the start of your turn, move a random "Puppet" card from your [gold]Discard pile[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
If it is [gold]Meruru Puppet[/gold], gain 10 [gold]Majoka[/gold].
MANOSABA-MERURU_PUPPET.title: Meruru Puppet
MANOSABA-MERURU_PUPPET.description:
Choose a card in your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold] and add it to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
If you choose [gold]AnAn Puppet[/gold], heal 3 HP.
MANOSABA-MERURU_PUPPET.selectionScreenPr: Choose a card to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MANOSABA-MIRIA_PUPPET.title: Miria Puppet
MANOSABA-NANOKA_PUPPET.title: Nanoka Puppet
MANOSABA-NANOKA_PUPPET.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
For each card with the "Puppet" tag, gain {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage.
If you have played [gold]Ema Puppet[/gold] this combat, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to 20% of damage dealt.
MANOSABA-NOAH_PUPPET.title: Noah Puppet
MANOSABA-NOAH_PUPPET.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
{IfUpgraded:show:|Random }[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold].
If you have played [gold]AnAn Puppet[/gold] this combat, apply {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
MANOSABA-PERFORMANCE_DRESS.title: Performance Dress
MANOSABA-PUPPET_FULL_TEST.title: Puppet Full Test
MANOSABA-REFUSE_MAJO.title: I Don't Want to Be a Witch
MANOSABA-REFUSE_MAJO.description:
Can only be played while you have fewer than 100 [gold]Majoka[/gold].
Transform all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]Boulders[/gold] with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] that can be played for free this turn.
Lose all [gold]Majoka[/gold].
MANOSABA-SEWING.title: Sewing
MANOSABA-SEWING.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
{IfUpgraded:show:Upgrade all cards with the "Puppet" tag in your [gold]Hand[/gold].|Choose a card with the "Puppet" tag in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and upgrade it.}
MANOSABA-SHERRY_PUPPET.title: Sherry Puppet
MANOSABA-SHERRY_PUPPET.description:
This turn, your next Attack card is played one extra time.
If you have played [gold]Hanna Puppet[/gold] this combat, add an [gold]Exhaust[/gold] [gold]Boulders[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold] that costs 0 this turn.
MANOSABA-SKY_ISLAND.title: Sky Island
MANOSABA-SKY_ISLAND.description: Based on [gold]Majoka[/gold], grant all allies {SkyIslandPower:diff()} stacks of [gold]Sky Island[/gold] (max 5 stacks).
MANOSABA-STRIKE_TONO_HANNA.title: Strike
MANOSABA-THRIFTY.title: Thrifty
MANOSABA-THRIFTY.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Status[/gold] cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain {IfUpgraded:show:3|2} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this way.
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_TONO_HANNA.title: Trauma
MANOSABA-TOUGH_IT_OUT.title: Tough It Out
MANOSABA-SHY_GLANCE.title: Shy Glance
MANOSABA-SHY_GLANCE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold].
MANOSABA-WATER_WALK.title: Water Walk
MANOSABA-SUSPICION.title: Suspicion
MANOSABA-SUSPICION.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Add a [gold]Dazed[/gold] to your [gold]Discard pile[/gold].
MANOSABA-MEAL_WITH_REWARD.title: Meal With a Reward
MANOSABA-MEAL_WITH_REWARD.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Add a [gold]Toxin[/gold] to your [gold]discard pile[/gold].
MANOSABA-LITTLE_MATCH_GIRL.title: The Little Match Girl
MANOSABA-LITTLE_MATCH_GIRL.description: Whenever you draw a [gold]Status[/gold] card, heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
MANOSABA-EMERGENCY_SUTURE.title: Emergency Suture
MANOSABA-ENERGY_IN_FRIDGE.title: Refrigeration
MANOSABA-STRIKE_HOSHO_MAGO.title: Strike
MANOSABA-DEFEND_HOSHO_MAGO.title: Defend
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_HOSHO_MAGO.title: Trauma
MANOSABA-DREAM_INTERPRETATION.title: Dream Interpretation
MANOSABA-DREAM_INTERPRETATION.descriptio: Choose 1 of 3 random [gold]Tarot[/gold] cards (excluding [gold]The World[/gold]) and add it to your [gold]Hand[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:|\nIt gains [gold]Exhaust[/gold].}
MANOSABA-DREAM_INTERPRETATION.selectionS: Choose a Tarot card to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MANOSABA-THE_FOOL.title: The Fool
MANOSABA-THE_FOOL.description:
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, then Coco takes over for you.
If your deck contains [gold]The World[/gold], instead gain {WorldEnergy} [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw {WorldCards} more cards next turn.
MANOSABA-THE_MAGICIAN.title: The Magician
MANOSABA-THE_MAGICIAN.description: Gain [gold]Majoka[/gold] equal to the number of [gold]Tarot[/gold] card types in your deck x {MajokaPower:diff()}.
MANOSABA-THE_HIGH_PRIESTESS.title: The High Priestess
MANOSABA-THE_HIGH_PRIESTESS.description: Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all Status cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain {CalculationExtra:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card exhausted this way.
MANOSABA-THE_EMPRESS.title: The Empress
MANOSABA-THE_EMPRESS.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Heal for 50% of damage dealt.
If [gold]The Emperor[/gold] is in your deck, this damage becomes 1.5x.
MANOSABA-THE_EMPEROR.title: The Emperor
MANOSABA-THE_EMPEROR.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]The Empress[/gold] is in your deck, this damage becomes 1.5x.
MANOSABA-THE_HIEROPHANT.title: The Hierophant
MANOSABA-THE_HIEROPHANT.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies.
MANOSABA-THE_LOVERS.title: The Lovers
MANOSABA-THE_LOVERS.description:
Apply {TheLoversPower:diff()} [gold]The Lovers[/gold] to an enemy.
When an enemy with [gold]The Lovers[/gold] is attacked, heal the applier for [blue]{TheLoversPower}%[/blue] of damage dealt.
If your deck contains [gold]The Devil[/gold], apply {DevilBonus} additional stacks.
MANOSABA-THE_CHARIOT.title: The Chariot
MANOSABA-THE_CHARIOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()} times.
If your deck contains [gold]Strength[/gold], attack {StrengthRepeatBonus} additional time.
MANOSABA-STRENGTH.title: Strength
MANOSABA-THE_HERMIT.title: The Hermit
MANOSABA-THE_HERMIT.description:
Gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].
If your deck contains [gold]The Moon[/gold] and [gold]The High Priestess[/gold], also apply the same amount of [gold]Intangible[/gold] to a random teammate.
MANOSABA-WHEEL_OF_FORTUNE.title: Wheel of Fortune
MANOSABA-WHEEL_OF_FORTUNE.description:
Choose up to {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Hand[/gold] and shuffle them into your [gold]Draw pile[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
If your deck contains [gold]The Hanged Man[/gold], draw {HangedManCards} additional card.
MANOSABA-WHEEL_OF_FORTUNE.selectionScree: Choose up to {Amount} cards to shuffle into your [gold]Draw pile[/gold].
MANOSABA-JUSTICE.title: Justice
MANOSABA-JUSTICE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Gain {InhibitionPower:diff()} [gold]Inhibition[/gold] per card exhausted.
If your deck contains [gold]Temperance[/gold], gain {TemperanceBlock} [gold]Block[/gold] per card exhausted.
MANOSABA-THE_HANGED_MAN.title: The Hanged Man
MANOSABA-DEATH.title: Death
MANOSABA-DEATH.description:
Apply {AllyDoom:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] to all allies.
Apply {EnemyDoom:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] to all enemies.
If your deck contains [gold]The Magician[/gold], multiply enemies' current [gold]Doom[/gold] by 1.5.
MANOSABA-TEMPERANCE.title: Temperance
MANOSABA-TEMPERANCE.description:
Gain {TemperancePower:diff()} [gold]Temperance[/gold].
If your deck contains [gold]Justice[/gold], also gain {JusticeBlock} [gold]Block[/gold].
MANOSABA-THE_DEVIL.title: The Devil
MANOSABA-THE_DEVIL.description:
Choose 1 of the following 3 cards and play it:
[gold]Eye of No Escape[/gold], [gold]Awakened Madness Power[/gold], [gold]Bestow Trial[/gold].
MANOSABA-THE_TOWER.title: The Tower
MANOSABA-THE_TOWER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Remove their [gold]Artifact[/gold].
Apply {TheTowerPower:diff()} [gold]Tower[/gold].
If your deck contains [gold]Death[/gold], also apply {DeathDoom} [gold]Doom[/gold].
MANOSABA-THE_STAR.title: The Star
MANOSABA-THE_STAR.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If your deck contains [gold]The Sun[/gold], [gold]The Moon[/gold], and [gold]The Star[/gold], double this [gold]Block[/gold].
This turn, take damage for the targeted player and reflect {IfUpgraded:show:150|100}% of damage received.
MANOSABA-THE_MOON.title: The Moon
MANOSABA-THE_MOON.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to 1 enemy.
Deal damage equal to {IfUpgraded:show:40|25}% of the target's total [gold]Poison[/gold], [gold]Doom[/gold], and [gold]Burn[/gold] stacks.
If your deck contains [gold]The Sun[/gold], [gold]The Moon[/gold], and [gold]The Star[/gold], double this damage.
MANOSABA-THE_SUN.title: The Sun
MANOSABA-THE_SUN.description:
Gain {TheSunPower:diff()} [gold]The Sun[/gold].
If your deck contains [gold]The Sun[/gold], [gold]The Moon[/gold], and [gold]The Star[/gold], apply this to all allies instead.
MANOSABA-JUDGEMENT.title: Judgement
MANOSABA-JUDGEMENT.description:
Remove all [gold]Debuffs[/gold] from yourself.
Gain [gold]Energy[/gold] equal to the number of effects removed.
If your deck contains [gold]The Hierophant[/gold], [gold]The High Priestess[/gold], and [gold]Justice[/gold], this [gold]Energy[/gold] gain is doubled.
MANOSABA-THE_WORLD.title: The World
MANOSABA-THE_WORLD.description:
If your [gold]Draw pile[/gold] is empty, costs 0 and win the combat.
Otherwise, upgrade all of your cards for the rest of combat.
MANOSABA-THE_DEVIL_EYE_OF_NO_ESCAPE_TOKE:
Apply {EyeOfNoEscapePower:diff()} turns of [gold]Eye of No Escape[/gold] to all players and enemies.
At end of turn, gain 20 [gold]Madness[/gold].
MANOSABA-THE_DEVIL_AWAKENED_MADNESS_POWE:
Apply {AwakenedMadnessPower:diff()} turns of [gold]Awakened Madness Power[/gold] to all players and enemies.
All unblocked attacks apply [gold]Madness[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
MANOSABA-THE_DEVIL_BESTOW_TRIAL_TOKEN.de: Reduce all players and enemies to 50% of their max HP; if already below, they remain unchanged. No effect on bosses.
MANOSABA-ECHOES.title: Imitation Magic
MANOSABA-ECHOES.description: A random card in your [gold]Draw pile[/gold] gains [gold]Replay[/gold] {Replay:diff()}.
MANOSABA-ALIBI.title: Alibi
MANOSABA-BAD_END.title: Bad End
MANOSABA-BAD_END.description: At the end of your turn, if this card is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], take {Damage:diff()} damage. Why is every choice a bad end?
MANOSABA-BOULDERS.title: Boulders
MANOSABA-BULLSEYE.title: Bullseye
MANOSABA-CONCENTRATED_FIRE.title: Concentrated Fire
MANOSABA-DEATH_PENDULUM.title: Death Pendulum
MANOSABA-DEATH_PENDULUM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies for each Skill in your [gold]Hand[/gold].{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
MANOSABA-GALLOWS.title: Gallows
MANOSABA-GALLOWS.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, ignoring enemy per-hit damage caps.
MANOSABA-FUTURE_OF_POTIONS.title: The Future of Potions?
MANOSABA-FUTURE_OF_POTIONS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Heal HP equal to 20% of damage dealt.
5% chance to take damage equal to your current HP.
If [gold]Hikami Meruru[/gold] is in your party, you won't drink the wrong potion.
MANOSABA-DISSOLVE.title: Dissolve
MANOSABA-DRIFT_APART.title: Drift Apart
MANOSABA-DRIFT_APART.description:
Apply {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] to a teammate.
Apply {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold] to yourself.
MANOSABA-DYING_MESSAGE.title: Dying Message
MANOSABA-DYING_MESSAGE.description: If you die this turn, next turn all allies draw {Cards:diff()} cards and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MANOSABA-ELECTROCUTION.title: Electrocution
MANOSABA-FORGE_SPEAR.title: Forge Spear
MANOSABA-FORGE_SPEAR.description:
Shuffle {Cards:diff()} each of [gold]Arrow[/gold], [gold]Rapier[/gold], [gold]Ribbon[/gold], and [gold]Broom[/gold] into your [gold]Draw pile[/gold].
When drawing, if your [gold]Hand[/gold] contains [gold]Arrow[/gold], [gold]Rapier[/gold], [gold]Ribbon[/gold], or [gold]Broom[/gold], consume one and gain a [gold]Simple Spear[/gold].
MANOSABA-FORTUNE_TELLING.title: Fortune Telling
MANOSABA-FORTUNE_TELLING.description: Choose {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]Draw pile[/gold] to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MANOSABA-FORTUNE_TELLING.selectionScreen: Choose {Cards:diff()} cards to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MANOSABA-GUILLOTINE.title: Guillotine
MANOSABA-GUILLOTINE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the target monster is below {BeheadedThreshold:diff()}% HP, it dies instantly.
MANOSABA-HOTPOT.title: Hot Pot
MANOSABA-HOUSE_KEEPING.title: Housekeeping
MANOSABA-IMMOLATION.title: Immolation
MANOSABA-IMMOLATION.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies and apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold].
MANOSABA-KEY_EVIDENCE.title: Key Evidence
MANOSABA-OPENING_STATEMENT.title: Opening Statement
MANOSABA-PICNIC_TIME.title: Picnic Time
MANOSABA-PICNIC_TIME.description:
Draw {Cards} cards.
At the start of your next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MANOSABA-PREPARE.title: Prepare
MANOSABA-PREPARE.description:
Discard 2 cards.
At the start of next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MANOSABA-PRISON.title: Witch Island Prison
MANOSABA-WITCH_ISLAND_EXPEDITION.title: Witch Island Expedition
MANOSABA-WARDEN_COMMAND.title: Warden's Command
MANOSABA-WARDEN_COMMAND.description: When you play an [gold]Execution[/gold] card, it is played an additional time.
MANOSABA-INHIBITION.title: Suppression
MANOSABA-SIMPLE_SPEAR.title: Simple Spear
MANOSABA-SLEEPING_PILL.title: Sleeping Pill
MANOSABA-SUICIDE.title: Seppuku to Heaven
MANOSABA-SUICIDE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to yourself and gain {MajokaPower:diff()} [gold]Majoka[/gold].
MANOSABA-KOKORO_SUICIDE.title: Seppuku to Heaven
MANOSABA-KOKORO_SUICIDE.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to yourself and gain {MajokaPower:diff()} [gold]Majoka[/gold].
MANOSABA-TRIAL_START.title: Witch Trial
MANOSABA-VOTE.title: Accuse
MANOSABA-VOTE.description: Draw {Cards} cards and apply {VotePower} [gold]Accused[/gold] to the target.
MANOSABA-WALL.title: Wall
MANOSABA-WORLD_VANQUISHER.title: World Vanquisher
MANOSABA-WORLD_VANQUISHER.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
At end of turn, if total [gold]Majoka[/gold] in combat is greater than [gold]Players[/gold] x {MajokaPower}, this card auto-plays from any pile and you win.
MANOSABA-YUKI_BACKFLIP.title: Backflip
MANOSABA-S_S_ARROW.title: Arrows
MANOSABA-S_S_RAPIER.title: Rapier
MANOSABA-S_S_RIBBON.title: Ribbon
MANOSABA-S_S_BROOM.title: Broom
MANOSABA-S_S_BROOM.description: Can't fly—it's just an ordinary broom.
MANOSABA-UNJUST_SENTENCE.title: Unjust Sentence
MANOSABA-UNJUST_SENTENCE.description: This enemy takes double attack damage this turn.
MANOSABA-ACTION_MOVIE.title: Action Movie
MANOSABA-ROMANTIC_MOVIE.title: Romantic Movie
MANOSABA-COMEDY_MOVIE.title: Comedy Movie
MANOSABA-HORROR_MOVIE.title: Horror Movie
MANOSABA-FANTASY_MOVIE.title: Fantasy Movie
MANOSABA-TEST_WAIT.title: test_wait
MANOSABA-STRIKE_NATSUME_ANAN.title: Strike
MANOSABA-DEFEND_NATSUME_ANAN.title: Defend
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_NATSUME_ANAN.title: Trauma
MANOSABA-FLASH_OF_INSPIRATION.title: Flash of Inspiration
MANOSABA-INSTIGATE.title: Instigate
MANOSABA-INSTIGATE.description:
Target player automatically plays the top card of their [gold]Draw pile[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:
That player draws {CardsNextTurn} additional card next turn.}
MANOSABA-JIGAISHIRO.title: Kill Yourself!
MANOSABA-READING.title: Reading
MANOSABA-ENDURANCE.title: Endurance
MANOSABA-WAGAHAIWANEKODEARU.title: I Am a Cat
MANOSABA-KOKORO.title: Kokoro
MANOSABA-KOKORO.description:
Gain [gold]Kokoro[/gold].
Shuffle {Cards:diff()} 0-cost [gold]Seppuku to Heaven[/gold] with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] and "Draw 1 card" into your [gold]Draw pile[/gold].
MANOSABA-BOCCHAN.title: Bocchan
MANOSABA-MOVABLE_TYPE_PRINTING.title: Movable Type Printing
MANOSABA-NANIGAIITAI.title: What Are You Trying to Say?
MANOSABA-NANIGAIITAI.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
MANOSABA-URUSAI.title: Shut Up!
MANOSABA-URUSAI.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy X times.
MANOSABA-NANDATO.title: What Did You Say?!
MANOSABA-NANDATO.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to [blue]5[/blue] x total drawn card costs.
MANOSABA-GENIUS_IDEA.title: Genius Idea
MANOSABA-PAPER_MAKING.title: Papermaking
MANOSABA-NOVEL_CREATION.title: Novel Creation
MANOSABA-NOVEL_CREATION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
If a teammate is [blue]Jogasaki Noah[/blue], one random teammate gains 1 [gold]Setting[/gold] card ([gold]Drawing - Fire-Breathing Rabbit[/gold], [gold]Drawing - Holy White Snake[/gold], [gold]Drawing - Clawed Cockatrice[/gold]).
MANOSABA-SETTING_FLAME_RABBIT.title: Drawing - Fire-Breathing Rabbit
MANOSABA-SETTING_FLAME_RABBIT.descriptio: Summon [blue]Fire-Breathing Rabbit[/blue] with [blue]25[/blue] HP. Reduce max Energy by 1. Its action each turn: apply [gold]Burn[/gold] [blue]5[/blue] to all enemies.
MANOSABA-SETTING_HOLY_WHITE_SNAKE.title: Drawing - Holy White Snake
MANOSABA-SETTING_HOLY_WHITE_SNAKE.descri: Summon [blue]Holy White Snake[/blue] with [blue]50[/blue] HP. Reduce max Energy by 1. Its action each turn: all players gain [blue]8[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
MANOSABA-SETTING_CLAWED_COCKATRICE.title: Drawing - Clawed Cockatrice
MANOSABA-SETTING_CLAWED_COCKATRICE.descr: Summon [blue]Clawed Cockatrice[/blue] with [blue]20[/blue] HP. Reduce max Energy by 1. Its action each turn: deal [blue]9[/blue] damage and apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] to all enemies.
MANOSABA-SETTING_CRIMSON_VALSTRAX.title: Drawing - Crimson Valstrax
MANOSABA-SETTING_CRIMSON_VALSTRAX.descri: Summon [blue]Crimson Valstrax[/blue] with [blue]500[/blue] HP. Reduce max Energy by 1. Its action each turn: deal [blue]100[/blue] unblockable damage that is unaffected by damage modifiers to all enemies.
MANOSABA-BRAINWASH.title: Brainwash Magic
MANOSABA-BRAINWASH.description:
All allies gain an extra turn.
Reduces [gold]Kotodama[/gold] cost based on current [gold]Majoka[/gold] (max {MajokaKotodamaCap:diff()}).
MANOSABA-SCORCHING.title: Scorching
MANOSABA-SCORCHING.description: At the start of your turn, apply {ScorchingPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] to all enemies, and gain {ScorchingPower:diff()} [gold]Fireball Swarm[/gold].
MANOSABA-STRIKE_SHITO_ALISA.title: Strike
MANOSABA-DEFEND_SHITO_ALISA.title: Defend
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_SHITO_ALISA.title: Trauma
MANOSABA-EMBER_SPARK.title: Ember Spark
MANOSABA-EMBER_SPARK.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Choose {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} card(s) in your hand without [gold]Combust[/gold] and [gold]Ignite[/gold], then give [gold]Combust[/gold] {CombustStacks:diff()}.
MANOSABA-EMBER_SPARK.selectionScreenProm: Choose a hand card without [gold]Combust[/gold] and [gold]Ignite[/gold].
MANOSABA-LIGHTER.title: Lighter
MANOSABA-FIRE_SWORD.title: Fire Sword
MANOSABA-FIRE_ON_FIRE.title: Fire on Fire
MANOSABA-FIRE_ON_FIRE.description: If the target has [gold]Burn[/gold], apply another {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold].
MANOSABA-SPREAD_BURN.title: Spread Burn
MANOSABA-SPREAD_BURN.description:
Spread one enemy's [gold]Burn[/gold] to all other enemies.
For each enemy spread to, gain {FireballGainPerSpread:diff()} [gold]Fireball Swarm[/gold].
MANOSABA-DISASTER_GIRL.title: Disaster Girl
MANOSABA-DISASTER_GIRL.description: Whenever you cumulatively apply 5 [gold]Burn[/gold], deal {DisasterGirlDmg:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
MANOSABA-SCALDING_TOUCH.title: Scalding Touch
MANOSABA-SCALDING_TOUCH.description: Whenever your Attack deals unblocked damage, apply {ScaldingTouchPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] to the target and gain {MajokaPower:diff()} [gold]Majoka[/gold].
MANOSABA-BURN_CAP.title: Burn Cap
MANOSABA-SNAKE_FIRE.title: Snake Fire
MANOSABA-SNAKE_FIRE.description:
Apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold].
Choose {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} card(s) in your hand without [gold]Combust[/gold] and [gold]Ignite[/gold], then give [gold]Combust[/gold] {CombustStacks:diff()}.
MANOSABA-SNAKE_FIRE.selectionScreenPromp: Choose a hand card without [gold]Combust[/gold] and [gold]Ignite[/gold].
MANOSABA-FIREBALL_SWARM_TEST.title: Fireball Swarm Test
MANOSABA-RESTRICTION_RELEASE.title: Restriction Release
MANOSABA-RESTRICTION_RELEASE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your entire hand.
Add [blue]8[/blue] [gold]Fireball[/gold] cards to your hand.
MANOSABA-FIREBALL.title: Fireball
MANOSABA-FLAMING.title: Flaming
MANOSABA-FLAMING.description:
Apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] to all enemies.
Gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Fireball Swarm[/gold].
MANOSABA-LET_HEART_BURN.title: Let Your Heart Burn
MANOSABA-LET_HEART_BURN.description:
Set your HP to 1.
Apply [gold]Burn[/gold] to all enemies equal to the HP you lost this way.
Add [gold]Dying Message+[/gold] to your hand.
MANOSABA-FIRE_TORNADO.title: Fire Tornado
MANOSABA-FIRE_TORNADO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies X times.
Apply X [gold]Burn[/gold] to ALL enemies.
MANOSABA-YOU_ARE_WEAK_EMA.title: You Are Weak, Ema
MANOSABA-YOU_ARE_WEAK_EMA.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
For each [gold]Fireball Swarm[/gold] you have, damage increases by {ExtraDamage:diff()}.
MANOSABA-THIS_IS_FINE.title: This Is Fine
MANOSABA-FIRE_JUDGEMENT_COURT.title: Fire Judgement Court
MANOSABA-FIRE_JUDGEMENT_COURT.descriptio:
Apply {BurnPower:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] to all enemies.
Immediately trigger [gold]Burn[/gold] effects {BurnTriggerCount:diff()} time(s) based on your [gold]Majoka[/gold] (max 3).
MANOSABA-SWEEP_UP.title: Sweep Up
MANOSABA-LOVE_FLAME.title: Flame of Love
MANOSABA-LOVE_FLAME.description:
Can only be played if you can lose 2 [gold]Fireball Swarm[/gold].
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
MANOSABA-COUNTER_VIOLENCE.title: Counter Violence
MANOSABA-MAGICIAN_RED.title: Magician's Red
MANOSABA-MAGICIAN_RED.description:
Can only be played if you can lose 4 [gold]Fireball Swarm[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply [gold]Red Bind[/gold].
MANOSABA-FINAL_COUNTDOWN.title: Final Countdown
MANOSABA-FINAL_COUNTDOWN.description:
Deal {Damage} damage to yourself.
Gain {FinalCountdownPower:diff()} [gold]Final Countdown[/gold].
MANOSABA-BOOK_OF_GREAT_OLD_ONES.title: Book of Great Old Ones
MANOSABA-BOOK_OF_GREAT_OLD_ONES.descript:
Gain X [gold]Sanity[/gold].
Remove all cards in your draw pile, hand, and discard pile from combat, then replace them with the [gold]Great Old Ones[/gold] deck.
MANOSABA-PAGE_AZATHOTH.title: Page - Azathoth
MANOSABA-PAGE_AZATHOTH.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
At turn end, if your exhaust pile has every differently named [gold]Great Old Ones[/gold] page, win the combat.
MANOSABA-PAGE_NYARLATHOTEP.title: Page - Nyarlathotep
MANOSABA-PAGE_NYARLATHOTEP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {ShadowFromTheSteeplePower:diff()} [gold]Shadow from the Steeple[/gold].
MANOSABA-PAGE_SHUB_NIGGURATH.title: Page - Shub-Niggurath
MANOSABA-PAGE_YOG_SOTHOTH.title: Page - Yog-Sothoth
MANOSABA-PAGE_HASTUR.title: Page - Hastur
MANOSABA-PAGE_HASTUR.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies {Hits:diff()} times.
MANOSABA-PAGE_CTHUGHA.title: Page - Cthugha
MANOSABA-PAGE_CTHUGHA.description:
At turn start, if this is in your exhaust pile, automatically play it.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
MANOSABA-PAGE_CTHULHU.title: Page - Cthulhu
MANOSABA-PAGE_CTHULHU.description:
The targeted player gains [gold]Call of Cthulhu[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:
You also gain [gold]Call of Cthulhu[/gold].}
MANOSABA-STRIKE_SAKURABA_EMA.title: Strike
MANOSABA-DEFEND_SAKURABA_EMA.title: Defend
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_SAKURABA_EMA.title: Trauma
MANOSABA-STRIKE_SAWATARI_COCO.title: Strike
MANOSABA-DEFEND_SAWATARI_COCO.title: Defend
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_SAWATARI_COCO.title: Trauma
MANOSABA-STRIKE_TSUKISHIRO_YUKI.title: Strike
MANOSABA-DEFEND_TSUKISHIRO_YUKI.title: Defend
MANOSABA-TRAUMA_TSUKISHIRO_YUKI.title: Trauma
